title: OpenAMP External Review Packet
description: Machine-checkable schema for a complete external review packet. Enables lab partners and reviewers to verify what a review packet contains before running experiments. The dry_lab_only_attestation field prevents review packets from being mistaken for biological proof.

packet_id.description: Unique identifier for this review packet (e.g. 'ERP-2026-07-09-001')

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the packet was generated

pipeline_version.description: OpenAMP pipeline version used to generate this packet

git_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the pipeline code used

candidate_count.description: Number of candidates in this packet

proof_ladder_level.description: Highest achieved proof-ladder level for this candidate (see PROOF_LADDER.md)

selection_rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why this candidate was selected

candidates.description: Array of candidate entries included in this review packet

n_positives.description: Number of positive sequences in the benchmark

n_negatives.description: Number of negative sequences in the benchmark

caveats.description: Honest limitations and caveats for this benchmark

brier_score.description: Brier score for pipeline ensemble probability calibration

n_calibration_samples.description: Number of samples used for calibration assessment

limitations.description: Honest limitations and caveats for this review packet. At minimum: 'Computational outputs are hypotheses and review aids. They are not biological proof.'

reviewed_by_human.description: Whether a human reviewed the safety assessment

safety_gate_passed.description: Whether all candidates pass the automated safety gate

no_known_toxicity_claim.description: Attestation that no claim of biological safety is made (dry-lab scores do not prove safety)

hemolysis_assay_mandatory.description: Whether hemolysis assay is mandatory for all candidates (true unless explicitly waived by human review)

safety_attestations.description: Safety-related attestations for this review packet

dry_lab_only_attestation.description: REQUIRED: Must be true. This packet contains dry-lab computational outputs only. These are hypotheses and review aids, not biological proof.

proof_ladder_level.description: Highest achieved proof-ladder level across all artifacts in this packet. Dry-lab outputs cannot exceed Level 2 (computationally nominated).

contact.description: Contact information for questions about this review packet

notes.description: Additional notes or context for reviewers
